cdc_start_position.description: The position in the change data capture (CDC) stream where the replication task should start.

cdc_start_time.description: The specific time when the change data capture (CDC) replication should start.

id.description: The unique identifier for the replication task.

migration_type.description: The type of migration being performed, such as full-load or CDC.

replication_instance_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the replication instance used for the task.

replication_task_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the replication task.

replication_task_settings.description: The settings for the replication task, including configuration details.

source_endpoint_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the source database endpoint.

start_replication_task.description: Indicates whether the replication task should start automatically.

status.description: The current status of the replication task.

table_mappings.description: The table mappings used for the task, defining how tables should be replicated.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs associated with the replication task for categorization.

target_endpoint_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target database endpoint.
